status: decomposed
parent: axon-ad2a9669
reason: The parent bead is too large for one bounded execution pass under the execute-bead size check. It has seven acceptance criteria spanning executor API design, in-memory store implementation, streaming runtime semantics, timeout enforcement, materialization rules, and a broad end-to-end integration suite. Per instructions, no implementation was attempted.
